meaning: n.外国旅客,出境后又回来之外侨
examples: Nonimmigrants enter the United States for a temporary period of time, and once in the United States, are restricted to the activity or reason for which their nonimmigrant visa was issued.
The nonimmigrant visa holders may be in the United States as tourists on business or as students.
Partly due to a less generous welfare state, American immigrant workers with lower educations have, for the most part, been more economically active than their nonimmigrant counterparts.
